MOTION For Evidence And Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf Larry Combs And His Attys For Failure To Comply With A Court Order And Discovery Misuse, And Motion For An Order Excluding The Testimony Of Pltf'S Expert, Alvin Schonfeld
Off Calendar May-06-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Timothy C. Connor, Esq. of TUCKER ELLIS & WEST (415-617-2209), appearing for defendant / moving party Linde Inc., a Delaware Corporation, FKA the BOC Group, Inc. and/or Airco, Inc.
Kimberly Chu, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Larry Combs

RULING:
DEFENDANT LINDE INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION, FKA the BOC Group, Inc. and/or Airco, Inc.'s MOTION For Evidence And Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Larry Combs And His Attorneys For Failure To Comply With A Court Order And Discovery Misuse, And Motion For An Order Excluding The Testimony Of Plaintiff'S Expert, Alvin Schonfeld. Argued and the Court made the following ruling: Defendant's motion is granted in part, denied in part. Plaintiff is ordered to make Dr. Schonfeld available for deposition at a place convenient to defendant Linde. If plaintiff chooses to depose Dr. Schonfeld in Chicago plaintiff will be responsible for all traveling expenses. Plaintiff should also make Dr. Breyer available for deposition. If not then Dr. Schonfeld cannot rely on Dr. Breyer's testimony. Both depositions should be completed as soon as possible. Plaintiff is sanctioned in the amount of $2,000 payable to defendant for failure to make Dr. Breyer and Dr. Schonfeld available for depositions. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Nancy E. Presant-McDonald, CSR # 9906 (Tel: 800-288-3376) = (220/HEK)
